## Test plan

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes and lint is clean (`ruff check` / `ruff format`)
- [ ] One logical change — no unrelated reformatting bundled in
- [ ] For a release: the version matches in `pyproject.toml` and `searchts/__init__.py`
- [ ] I've skimmed [what we merge](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#what-we-merge-and-what-we-dont)
